title: UI-042: file/link source metadata is work-owned, file/link lifecycle status is retired, file/link add/edit/delete...
summary: work files and links no longer have independent workflows, but the work editor still presented them as child records with separate add/edit routes. Outcome: file/link source metadata is work-owned, file/link lifecycle status is retired, file/link add/edit/delete runs in the work editor, and the standalone pages/scripts/source JSON files have been removed.
body:
## UI Rule Log 2026-04-27 / UI-042

- status: adopted
- route: `/studio/catalogue-work/`
- issue: work files and links no longer have independent workflows, but the work editor still presented them as child records with separate add/edit routes.
- triage: repeated catalogue-editor source-model mismatch
- reasoning: child metadata should not get separate editor routes unless it has an independent lifecycle or workflow. Files and links are now work-owned metadata, so the work editor should be the owning surface.
- outcome: file/link source metadata is work-owned, file/link lifecycle status is retired, file/link add/edit/delete runs in the work editor, and the standalone pages/scripts/source JSON files have been removed.
- files changed:
  - `assets/studio/data/catalogue/works.json`
  - `assets/studio/js/catalogue-work-editor.js`
  - `assets/studio/js/catalogue-status.js`
  - `scripts/catalogue_source.py`
  - `scripts/generate_work_pages.py`
  - `scripts/studio/catalogue_write_server.py`
  - `_docs/site-request-work-owned-files-links.md`
  - `_docs/catalogue-work-editor.md`
  - `_docs/data-models-catalogue.md`
  - `_docs/scripts-generate-work-pages.md`
  - `_docs/scripts-catalogue-write-server.md`
  - `_docs/catalogue-status.md`
  - `_docs/site-change-log.md`
  - `_docs/studio-ui-rules.md`
- local verification:
  - validate catalogue source records after migration
  - open a work with downloads/links and confirm the sections display as summaries rather than navigation into standalone editors
- follow-up:
  - replace read-only summaries with add/edit/delete modals on the work editor
effect: child metadata should not get separate editor routes unless it has an independent lifecycle or workflow.
verification: validate catalogue source records after migration
open a work with downloads/links and confirm the sections display as summaries rather than navigation into standalone editors
replace read-only summaries with add/edit/delete modals on the work editor
